outcome.title: Fundamentals #1
outcome.description: Evaluate sine, cosine, tangent, cotangent, secant, or cosecant of angles on the unit circle in both degrees [0°, 360°) and radians [0, 2π), giving exact simplified answers.

outcome.title: Fundamentals #2
outcome.description: Determine whether the value of a trig function is positive or negative in each quadrant, and whether the function is increasing or decreasing in each quadrant. .

outcome.title: Fundamentals #3
outcome.description: Label a right triangle with standard labeling and and the provided side lengths, then find the requested values.
